name: Chili with Pinto Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the meat, stirring often.
2. Using a blender, combine garlic, sweet pepper, onion, celery, tomato paste, tomato sauce, V-8 juice, chili peppers, chili powder, salt, and black pepper. Blend the mixture well and add it to the browned meat.
3. Pour in water and beef broth and cook slowly for 3 hours.
4. Add paprika and cumin.
5. Cook pinto beans (3 cups) in water over medium heat for 1 hour.
6. Combine remaining ingredients and cook on low heat until done, about 2 hours.
7. Add the cooked beans to the chili.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
